name: noop_method_stub
description: NoOp::MethodStub is non-authored no-op glue: a single return instruction that ignores ECX and touches no state.
known_limits: NoOp::MethodStub is non-authored glue and has no production C++ body to compare as an authored function.
Binary Ninja disassembly for 0x413eb0 is a single retn instruction; the smoke exercises HUD shutdown paths that call the equivalent no-op method stub without state changes.
